Convert barometric pressure between units

Source: R/convert_pressure.R
convert_pressure.Rd

Converts barometric pressure from one unit to another using exact conversion factors. Always returns a plain numeric vector.

Usage

convert_pressure(pressure, from, to = "atm")

Arguments

pressure

Numeric. Barometric pressure value(s) to be converted.

from

Character. Units of the input barometric pressure. Accepted values are "atm", "hPa", "mbar", "kPa", "Pa", "Torr", "mmHg", "psi", and "bar".

to

Character. Target unit. Same accepted values as from. Defaults to "atm".

Value

Numeric vector of barometric pressure in the requested unit.

Examples

convert_pressure(101.3, from = "kPa", to = "atm")
#> [1] 0.9997533
convert_pressure(1013.25, from = "hPa", to = "Pa")
#> [1] 101325
